{{Quote|The Imperial Star Destroyers ''Bombard'' and ''Crusader'' limped back to Ord Grovner Naval Base this week after dealing a death-blow to the arrogant and once-almighty Eyttyrmin Pirates of the Khuiumin system.|[[TriNebulon News/Legends|TriNebulon News]]|<ref name="GNN6">{{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>}}
The '''''Bombard''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
Commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Alistar Dadefra]], this ship, along with her sister ship [[Crusader (Victory-class)|''Crusader'']], destroyed the [[Eyttyrmin Batiiv]] pirate armada at the [[Battle of Khuiumin]]. At [[Courkrus|Khuiumin]], Dadefra ordered the ''Bombard'' into the thick of the pirate fleet. The ship first used its [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beams]] to shield itself with enemy [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvettes]], before deploying [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper|spacetroopers]] to capture those ships. The shock of seeing their own ships turned against them, along with the ''Bombard's'' jamming, sent the pirates into disarray, making them easy to destroy.

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] planted an [[espionage droid]] onboard the ''Bombard''.<ref name="RASB2">[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]</ref>
